articles.title: Oil falls after US, Iran talks conclude in Doha
articles.description: Oil prices dipped as Qatar reported positive progress in indirect Iran-U.S. talks concerning the vital Strait of Hormuz. Despite recent exchanges, tanker traffic is recovering, with U.S. officials noting a return to pre-war levels. This, coupled with anticipated OPEC+ output hikes and a smaller-than-expected draw in U.S. crude inventories, is fueling expectations of oversupply and pushing prices lower.

articles.title: Oil prices fall after U.S.-Iran talks conclude in Doha
articles.description: Oil prices fell more than 1% on Wednesday after talks between Washington and Tehran concluded.

articles.title: Brent crude prices fall below $71 a barrel as traffic flows through Hormuz, talks progress
articles.description: Crude oil prices reported their worst quarter since 2020, reversing all the gains made during the Iran war, during which prices had gone up to as high as $125 a barrel. Prices are now extending losses as flows continue through Hormuz, though not at pre-war levels, but better than peak war levels too.

articles.title: AIMTC Welcomes Nayara's ₹5 Petrol, ₹3 Diesel Cut - Urges Centre And OMCs To Follow Suit Amid Falling Crude
articles.description: All India Motor Transport Congress advisor Bal Malkit Singh has urged the Centre and oil marketing companies to reduce fuel prices, following Nayara Energy’s decision to cut petrol by ₹5 per litre and diesel by ₹3 per litre. He cited falling global crude prices below $70 per barrel and called for relief to transporters facing high operational costs and freight pressures.

articles.title: 2026 Chery C5 and E5 price and specs: Hybrid joins small SUV range
articles.description: The Chery C5 can now be had with hybrid power like the boxier, more popular Tiggo 4 small SUV, joining existing petrol and electric options.
